source: Things to do in Raleigh this Weekend! — Thingstodo919

events.name: Out! Raleigh Pride
events.tagline: Raleigh's 14th annual LGBTQ+ street festival returns with a new Friday night for adults and a family-friendly Saturday.
events.description: Out! Raleigh Pride is the city's annual LGBTQ+ street festival on Fayetteville Street, featuring live entertainment, vendors, food, a KidsZone, and a beer garden with no admission fee.

events.name: Discover Dance: AfroBeats Session
events.tagline: Experience the energy and rhythm of AfroBeats in this free, interactive cultural dance session led by a Kenyan DJ and expert instructors.
events.description: Discover Dance: AfroBeats is a free cultural dance program led by DJ Sunny Sistuki, a Kenyan native, where participants learn moves rooted in Pan-African rhythms from West, East, and Southern Africa.

events.name: An Evening with Goose
events.tagline: Rock band Goose brings their high-energy live show to Raleigh for a two-night festival experience.
events.description: An Evening with Goose is a two-day rock concert featuring the band Goose at Red Hat Amphitheater in Downtown Raleigh, with shows starting at 7 PM on Friday and Saturday.

events.name: Classics Under the Stars with the North Carolina Symphony
events.tagline: Pack your picnic for great classical music under the stars at Koka Booth Amphitheatre.
events.freeNote: Kids 12 & under are admitted free on the lawn
events.description: The North Carolina Symphony presents an evening of light classical favorites including Mozart, Grieg, and Stravinsky under the stars at Koka Booth Amphitheatre.

events.name: ADF Presents: Charlotte Ballet
events.tagline: Experience Ohad Naharin's playful and mischievous Kamuyot in a unique gymnasium setting.
events.venue: Jewish for Good at the Levin JCC
events.scheduleNote: Fri 5:30 PM & 8 PM · Sat 1 PM & 4 PM · Sun 1 PM & 4 PM
events.description: The American Dance Festival presents Charlotte Ballet performing Ohad Naharin's Kamuyot, a 50-minute work that breaks from traditional theater to connect dancers and audience in a gymnasium.

events.name: Comedy Show: Leslie Norris Townsend + Phil “Grampy” Ketron
events.tagline: Veteran stand-up comedians Leslie Norris Townsend and Phil “Grampy” Ketron deliver a night of audience-participation laughter.
events.description: This comedy event features veteran performers Leslie Norris Townsend, who blends stand-up with audience participation, and opener Phil “Grampy” Ketron.

events.name: Late Night at Longleaf
events.tagline: A free stand-up comedy show every last Friday of the month featuring local performers
events.description: Late Night at Longleaf is a free stand-up comedy show held every last Friday of the month at The Longleaf Lounge in Raleigh, featuring rotating local comics from 9 to 11 PM.

events.name: Ben Bankas
events.tagline: Comedy star Ben Bankas brings his sharp, Toronto-born humor to Raleigh's Goodnights Comedy Club.
events.description: Ben Bankas, originally from Toronto, Canada, performs two shows on Friday, June 26, 2026 at Goodnights Comedy Club in Raleigh, with tickets starting at $52.

events.name: Carolina Flyers Ultimate Frisbee vs Atlanta Hustle
events.tagline: Super Hero Night with DJ Mista Illz and themed games between quarters
events.description: Professional ultimate frisbee game featuring the Carolina Flyers against the Atlanta Hustle at Durham County Memorial Stadium with Super Hero Night festivities.

events.name: AUSL Signature Series at Durham Bulls Athletic Park
events.tagline: Professional softball takes center stage as Carolina Blaze hosts Utah Talons in a three-game showdown.
events.scheduleNote: Fri Jun 26 6:00 PM ET · Sat Jun 27 2:00 PM ET
events.description: The AUSL Signature Series brings professional softball to Durham Bulls Athletic Park from June 25–27, featuring the Carolina Blaze hosting the defending champion Utah Talons in a nationally visible three-game series.

events.name: Emo Nite
events.tagline: The ultimate night of 2000s pop-rock, emo, and scene hits live at The Ritz.
events.description: Emo Nite (18+) brings the best of 2000s pop-rock and emo music to The Ritz in Raleigh on Friday, June 26, 2026 at 8 PM.

events.name: Interdependence Day
events.tagline: A people-powered evening of art, action, and community where you can do something, make something, and meet your people.
events.description: Interdependence Day is a celebration of how we rely on one another, featuring hands-on art, local organizations offering ways to take action, and space to connect with neighbors at Durham Central Park.

events.name: Battle Of The Legends (80's, 90's, 2000s)
events.tagline: The ultimate throwback music battle featuring hits from the 80s, 90s, and 2000s.
events.description: Battle Of The Legends is a curated musical event in Raleigh featuring a multi-genre soundclash of hits from the 1980s, 1990s, and 2000s[7]. The event takes place at The Haymaker on Friday, June 26, 2026, starting at 9:00 PM and is free to attend[1].

events.name: Ben Danaher w/Kenny Roby
events.tagline: An evening of live music with Ben Danaher and special guest Kenny Roby
events.description: Ben Danaher performs with special guest Kenny Roby at The Wake Forest Listening Room on Friday, June 26, 2026, with doors opening at 6:45 PM and the show starting at 7:30 PM.

events.name: Beyblade Rave THREE
events.tagline: A unique themed dance party with Beyblade battles, DNB, and flashing lights until 2am.
events.venue: The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop
events.description: Beyblade Rave THREE brings a unique themed dance party to The Pour House Music Hall in Raleigh on June 26, 2026, featuring Beyblade battles, DNB music, and flashing lights until 2am.

events.name: Day Aches / Suns / Bluegill
events.tagline: Three distinct rock and alternative bands showcase grungy shoegaze and new music at Kings.
events.description: Day Aches, Suns, and Bluegill perform a live rock and alternative music showcase at Kings in Raleigh on Friday, June 26, 2026[4][10].

events.name: France vs. Norway - Watch Party with Raleigh Sister Cities
events.tagline: Stream live men's soccer with drink specials and watch-party energy at Transfer Co. Food Hall.
events.description: Join Raleigh Sister Cities to stream the France vs. Norway men's soccer match live in the Lift Bay at Transfer Co. Food Hall, featuring drink specials and a lively social atmosphere.

events.name: Gay Men's Speed Dating
events.tagline: A fun evening of mingling and quick chats to find your match.
events.description: Gay men 21+ (trans, NB, and gender-diverse inclusive) join for 7-minute speed dating rounds meeting 10+ people in downtown Raleigh. Match cards and conversation prompts are provided, with contact info shared via email if two people select each other.

events.name: Queer Icons
events.tagline: A local drag and burlesque show featuring iconic names from Queer History, followed by a Pride party.
events.description: Queer Icons is a local drag and burlesque show featuring iconic names from Queer History at The Pinhook, followed by a Pride party hosted by DJ Vanessa X. Machina.

events.name: Heluva Dance Social - Friday Night Country
events.tagline: Beginner-friendly country dancing with a lesson and social party
events.scheduleNote: Fri 8–11 PM · Lesson 8–9 PM · Social 9–11 PM
events.description: A welcoming, beginner-friendly country swing social featuring a lesson from 8–9 PM and social dancing from 9–11 PM at Chatham Station in Cary.

events.name: Holly Springs Salamanders vs. Yorktown Coconuts
events.tagline: Minor league baseball showdown with Margaritaville Night tropical vibes and themed jerseys.
events.description: The Holly Springs Salamanders face the Yorktown Coconuts in a minor league baseball game at North Main Athletic Complex on Friday, June 26, 2026, at 6:30 PM, featuring Margaritaville Night with tropical island party themes.

events.name: Pigeons Playing Ping Pong
events.tagline: Late-night rock party with Pigeons Playing Ping Pong at Lincoln Theatre
events.description: Pigeons Playing Ping Pong brings their high-energy late-night rock show to Lincoln Theatre in Raleigh on June 26–27, 2026, with doors opening an hour before the 11:30 PM show.

events.name: Dex Fest Music Festival
events.tagline: A two-night music festival celebrating the legacy of Dexter Romweber for musicians and the music-obsessed
events.description: Dex Fest is a two-night music festival in Carrboro celebrating the spirit and musical legacy of Dexter Romweber, featuring performances for musicians and the music-obsessed.

events.name: Seven Teller: Red Hat Amphitheater Afterparty
events.tagline: Goose fans party after the Red Hat show at Kings with Seven Teller.
events.description: Seven Teller returns for Round 2 of the Red Hat Amphitheater afterparty at Kings, just up the road from the venue, with a chance Goose may join the party[8][10].

events.name: Shadows in Red Light
events.tagline: A concert version of a new musical set during the AIDS epidemic in New York City, exploring hope, sacrifice, and belonging.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 7:30 PM · Sat 2 PM · Sun 2 PM
events.description: Shadows in Red Light is a concert version of a new musical by Roné Sargent that follows a mother and daughter through adversity during the AIDS epidemic, touching on themes of love and belonging.

events.name: Sour Candy 2.0
events.tagline: The Resurrection: a pop music dance party on Neptunes' bottom level
events.description: Sour Candy 2.0 is a pop music dance party held on the bottom level of Neptunes Parlour in Raleigh, featuring DJ spins and dancing from 10 PM to 2 AM on Friday, June 26, 2026[1][4].

events.name: US ARMY 82nd AIRBORNE DIVISION ALL-AMERICAN BAND AND CHORUS: This We’ll Defend: The All American Story
events.tagline: Celebrate America and the Army’s 250th birthday with patriotic music and historical accounts from the 82nd Airborne Division.
events.description: The 82nd Airborne Division All-American Band and Chorus presents patriotic music and historical accounts to honor the Army’s 250th anniversary at Garner Performing Arts Center.

events.name: Verses & Vibes: So So Def x Murda Inc Edition
events.tagline: An upbeat open mic where poetry meets music and nostalgia fuels the energy.
events.description: Verses & Vibes is an intimate, upbeat open mic experience featuring poets, storytellers, singers, and comedians, with good music and nostalgic vibes.

events.name: Wasteland w/ DJ Fallout Steve & DJ Ghost
events.tagline: Dance to the roar of a big machine on the dark dance floor at Chapel of Bones.
events.description: Wasteland is a monthly goth night featuring darkwave, industrial, EBM, and midnight gloom with DJ Fallout Steve and DJ Ghost at Chapel of Bones in Raleigh.

events.name: Zebulon Devil Dogz vs. Peninsula Pilots
events.tagline: Catch the Devil Dogz and Peninsula Pilots under the lights for Father's Day Weekend!
events.description: The Zebulon Devil Dogz face the Peninsula Pilots at Nomaco Park on Friday, June 26, 2026, at 6:30 PM as part of Father's Day Weekend festivities.

events.name: 52nd Annual Raleigh Money Expo
events.tagline: North Carolina's premier coin and currency showcase with over 100 dealers and 200 tables of rare finds.
events.venue: Expo Center at the North Carolina State Fairgrounds
events.description: The 52nd Annual Raleigh Money Expo is the largest coin and stamp show in the state, featuring rare coins, educational seminars, exhibits, and a Kid's Zone for free coin learning.

events.name: One Tribe Drum Circle & Fire Show
events.tagline: A free, family-friendly drum circle with fire spinning and West African dances.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 7–8:30 PM · Fire performance at 8 PM
events.description: Join One Tribe Rhythms & Friends for a free, interactive drum circle featuring West African dances and fire spinning by Caroleena & Friends at the Old Library Site in Downtown Cary.

events.name: The Harry Show
events.tagline: Things may get Harry during this adult-oriented improv party!
events.description: An adult-oriented improv party featuring laid-back, casual improv games designed to make you chortle. Rated M for Mature; anyone under 18 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian.

events.name: Weesefest 2026
events.tagline: A three-day ALS fundraiser party at Slim's Dive Bar with live music and community spirit.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 5–11 PM · Sat 5–11 PM · Sun 5–11 PM
events.description: Weesefest 2026 is a three-day music festival at Slim's Dive Bar in Downtown Raleigh, serving as a fundraiser for ALS United North Carolina to support ALS research and treatment discovery.

events.name: keiyaA at Stanczyks
events.tagline: Chicago-born vocalist keiyaA brings her 2026 tour to Durham with BLACKASTHECOSMOS
events.description: KeiyaA, a Chicago-born vocalist, songwriter, producer, and multi-instrumentalist known for alternative r&b and bedroom pop, performs at Stanczyks in Durham on Friday, June 26, 2026, with BLACKASTHECOSMOS.

events.name: Chuck Ragan (Hot Water Music) at Motorco
events.tagline: Hot Water Music co-frontman Chuck Ragan brings raw punk-folk energy to Durham with Overton and Brian McGee.
events.description: Chuck Ragan, co-frontman of pioneering punk band Hot Water Music, performs a solo set at Motorco Music Hall in Durham on June 26, 2026, joined by Overton and Brian McGee.

events.name: Night Therapy x Somatic House Collective
events.tagline: Your next dance floor appointment has been scheduled!
events.description: Night Therapy and Somatic House Collective take over Rubies On Five Points for a heavy dance floor experience in Durham. Must be 21+.

events.name: Carrboro's Pride Piper Walk & Pride Dance Party / Fiesta del Orgullo
events.tagline: Join the Pride Piper Walk and celebrate with music, drag, and community at Carrboro's free Pride Dance Party.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 4:30–9:00 PM · Walk 4:30 PM, Dance Party 5–9 PM
events.description: Carrboro's Pride Piper Walk begins at 4:30 PM with a procession from El Centro Hispano to Town Commons, followed by the free Pride Dance Party featuring food, music, drag performances, and LGBTQ+ resources from 5 to 9 PM.

events.name: Last Fridays & The Art Walk
events.tagline: Hillsborough's monthly celebration of art, culture, and local makers on the last Friday of every month.
events.description: Every last Friday from April to October, Downtown Hillsborough showcases its art scene with gallery openings, live music, and local artist studios. The Old Orange County Courthouse lawn serves as the central hub for this free, family-friendly event.

events.name: Night Market on the Square
events.tagline: Shop handmade crafts, boutique clothing, and local art under the stars in downtown Clayton.
events.description: The Night Market on the Square features local artists, handmade crafts, and boutique clothing and jewelry at Horne Square in downtown Clayton[3].

events.name: BrickUniverse
events.tagline: The nation's largest LEGO® fan event featuring award-winning artists and massive brick-built creations.
events.description: BrickUniverse is a large-scale LEGO® fan event in Raleigh featuring award-winning artists, interactive building zones, and a vendor marketplace with unique sets and collectibles for all ages[1][2].

events.name: The Music of Billy Joel with Tony DeSare at Summerfest
events.tagline: Tony DeSare's signature vocal and robust piano style pay tribute to Billy Joel's iconic songs under the stars.
events.freeNote: Tickets required; kids 12 & under free on the lawn
events.description: Tony DeSare performs a symphonic tribute to Billy Joel at UNC Health Summerfest, featuring full orchestrations and audience sing-alongs under the stars at Koka Booth Amphitheatre.

events.name: Notes on View: Soundwave Supply Co.
events.tagline: Live music in the galleries inspired by art, featuring 40-minute performances that respond to works on display.
events.description: Notes on View is a pop-up music series at the NCMA featuring live performances that resonate with art on display, inviting visitors to experience the galleries through sound and shared creativity.

events.name: Baseball Shuffle: Sandlot Classic
events.tagline: Step up to the plate for a family-friendly baseball tournament and all-day festival of play, competition, and crowd energy.
events.description: Join the Baseball Shuffle Sandlot Classic on June 27th at Transfer Co. Ballroom in downtown Raleigh for free open-play, minor and all-star tournaments, and a beer tasting tournament (21+). Tickets are $10 and purchased on-site.

events.name: CaryLIVE! Abraham Alexander
events.tagline: Free outdoor concert featuring Academy Award-nominated singer-songwriter Abraham Alexander under the stars.
events.description: CaryLIVE! is a free outdoor concert series at Downtown Cary Park designed to bring the community together through live music. This session features a professional performance by Academy Award-nominated singer-songwriter Abraham Alexander.

events.name: Triangle Pride Band - 10th Anniversary Celebration - Summer Concert
events.tagline: Celebrate a decade of musical excellence with four TPB ensembles in an unforgettable evening at Fletcher Opera Theater.
events.address: Martin Marietta Center for the Performing Arts, Raleigh, NC
events.description: Join the Triangle Pride Band for their 10th anniversary concert featuring the Symphonic, Jazz, Chorus, and Marching ensembles, including world premieres and a guest appearance by drag artist Franny Starlight.

events.name: The Myers House | Halloween Replica Film House Visit
events.tagline: Tour a life-size replica of Michael Myers' house with candy, photos, and spooky fun in Hillsborough.
events.description: This event offers an exterior tour of a life-size replica of Michael Myers' house from the 1978 film Halloween, including trick-or-treat candy and a photo opportunity on the front porch in Hillsborough, North Carolina.

events.name: Trainspotting: 30th Anniversary
events.tagline: Celebrate the 30th anniversary of this Gen X cynical irreverence on the big screen.
events.description: A high-definition 4K restoration of the 1996 British black comedy crime drama, set in Edinburgh's drug underworld, returns for its 30th anniversary screening.

events.name: Beer, Bacon, and Bluegrass
events.tagline: Cold beer, crispy bacon, and live bluegrass strings at Oaklyn Springs Brewery.
events.description: Enjoy free bacon, awesome craft beer, and jamming bluegrass music at Oaklyn Springs Brewery in Fuquay-Varina on Saturday, June 27, 2026.

events.name: America250 Knowing the West Community Day
events.tagline: Celebrate America's 250th with free admission to the 'Knowing the West' exhibit and hands-on art activities.
events.venue: North Carolina Museum of Art; East Building, Level B
events.description: Join a community day featuring free admission to the 'Knowing the West' exhibition, artist demonstrations, and hands-on art making at the North Carolina Museum of Art.

events.name: Happy Birthday America Party at Marbles
events.tagline: Celebrate America's 250th birthday with live music, art activities, games, an IMAX adventure, and a birthday parade.
events.description: A free, family-friendly celebration of America's 250th birthday featuring live performances, toe-tapping music, creative art activities, games, an IMAX historical adventure, and a birthday parade.

events.name: We the People
events.tagline: Witness the story of America’s founding documents and the people who shaped them.
events.description: An immersive documentary presentation exploring the origin of the foundational documents of the United States and the people who wrote, shaped, and tested them. Showtimes are first come, first served.

events.name: Red Hot Historical Summer | Live Comedy
events.tagline: A live comedy show that takes you back through the pages of history with character monologues and improv.
events.description: Red Hot Historical Summer is a live comedy event featuring character monologues and improv that humorously explores historical themes at The ArtsCenter in Carrboro.

events.name: ADF Presents: Kimberly Bartosik/daela w/ Post-Performance Discussion
events.tagline: A haunting, emotionally intense dance piece exploring overdose trauma, followed by a post-performance discussion.
events.description: Kimberly Bartosik/daela’s bLUr is a highly physical dance piece about witnessing a loved one’s overdose, performed with five dancers and followed by a post-performance discussion.

events.name: CRTL + Pride: Haus Party Edition
events.tagline: An inclusive celebration honoring the LGBTQ+ community through music, dance, and collective joy.
events.venue: Friends of a Friend x Killjoy
events.address: 116 N. West St., Ste. 100, Raleigh, NC 27603
events.description: CRTL + Pride: Haus Party Edition is an inclusive celebration designed to honor the LGBTQ+ community through music, dance, and collective energy at Killjoy in Downtown Raleigh.

events.name: Garf's Great Goblin Giveaway
events.tagline: Join Garf the goblin as he guides contestants through challenges, riddles, and rip-offs of game show favorites.
events.description: Garf's Great Goblin Giveaway is a brand new live game show where audience contestants compete in challenges and riddles hosted by Garf the goblin. This FREE event takes place at Common Market in Durham on Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 7 p.m.

events.name: Summer Connection : Rooftop Brunch
events.tagline: Step into the perfect summer day with rooftop brunch, tequila, and stylish vibes.
events.venue: Level7 Rooftop Lounge at the AC Hotel Raleigh North Hills
events.address: 101 Park at North Hills St., Raleigh, NC 27609
events.description: The Summer Connection is a rooftop brunch and day social curated for those who appreciate good music, stylish crowds, and unforgettable moments, featuring El Yanga Tequila and DJ Grant.

events.name: Sabrosura — Summer Concert Series
events.tagline: Free Saturday night of Latin jazz and dance at Durham's Forest Hills Park
events.description: Sabrosura, a six-piece Latin jazz and dance band, performs as part of Durham Parks and Recreation’s free summer concert series at Forest Hills Park on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 6 to 8 PM.

events.name: Caffeine & Machines Monthly Car Show Series
events.tagline: A free, monthly morning car meet for Raleigh where everyone is welcome.
events.scheduleNote: Last Saturday of the month, 8:00 AM – 11:00 AM
events.description: Caffeine & Machines is a free monthly car meet in North Raleigh held on the last Saturday of each month from 8–11 AM at Triangle Town Center, welcoming all car enthusiasts and casual visitors.

events.name: GAG, Queen x Doll Domination
events.tagline: A high-energy 2-for-1 drag show celebrating camp, drag, and music for Raleigh Pride.
events.description: GAG, Queen x Doll Domination is a high-energy nightlife event celebrating drag artistry and performance culture, featuring RuPaul Drag Race alumni and an all-trans drag show for Raleigh Pride[4][5].

events.name: AZUL / Pynk Moscato / Crossfire / DJ Bre
events.tagline: AZUL throws a Pride Weekend party at Kings with genre-bending jazz, folk, and soul sounds.
events.description: AZUL hosts a Pride Weekend celebration at Kings in Raleigh, featuring genre-bending solo performances blending jazz, folk, and soul alongside DJ Bre, Crossfire, and Pynk Moscato.

events.name: Weesefest 2026
events.tagline: A three-day party fundraiser for ALS United North Carolina to discover a cure for ALS.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 5–11:30 PM · Sat 5–11:30 PM · Sun 5–11 PM
events.description: Weesefest 2026 is a three-day music festival at Slim's Dive Bar featuring multiple local bands to support ALS research and treatment discovery.

events.name: An Evening with Stuart McLamb & Sean Thomas Gerard
events.tagline: A rare solo set by Stuart McLamb with Sean Thomas Gerard kicking things off at 7:30 PM
events.description: Stuart McLamb performs a rare solo set at The Wake Forest Listening Room with Sean Thomas Gerard opening the show at 7:30 PM on Saturday, June 27, 2026[1][2][7].

events.name: Broadslab - Album Release w/ The Beard Cult / Archaos
events.tagline: Broadslab drops their new album 'The Fifth Essence' with a live metal show at Chapel of Bones.
events.description: Broadslab celebrates the release of their new album 'The Fifth Essence' with a live performance featuring The Beard Cult and Archaos at Chapel of Bones in Raleigh.

events.name: Afternoon in the Garden
events.tagline: Celebrate Pollinator Week with native seeds, crafts, and live pollinator interactions at Apex Nature Park.
events.description: This free Saturday event features native seeds for your garden, pollinator-themed crafts, story time, and the chance to interact with live insects from the Museum of Life & Science.

events.name: Danger!
events.tagline: A wild solo show about a man convinced his neighbor's son is a changeling and the lengths he'll go to prove a monster lives among us.
events.venue: Burning Coal Theatre - The Murphey School
events.description: Danger! is a wild solo show by Lucius Robinson about a man convinced his neighbor's son is a changeling, exploring the extreme lengths he takes to prove a monster lives among us.

events.name: End of Pride - Big Gay Rave
events.tagline: Dance, express yourself, and celebrate LGBTQ+ joy in a vibrant, inclusive rave environment.
events.description: This event offers a space for the LGBTQ+ community and allies to gather, dance, and express themselves in a vibrant, inclusive environment[6].

events.name: Small Business Pride Ride
events.tagline: A community bicycle tour celebrating local small businesses and LGBTQ+ pride in Raleigh.
events.address: 600 W Cabarrus St, STE 113, Raleigh, NC 27603
events.description: The Small Business Pride Ride is a community bicycle tour that highlights local small businesses while celebrating LGBTQ+ pride in downtown Raleigh. The event is free and family-friendly, taking place on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m.

events.name: Forest Bathing
events.tagline: A guided journey into nature's wisdom to slow down, awaken your senses, and reconnect with the natural world.
events.venue: JC Raulston Arboretum at North Carolina State University
events.description: Led by certified Forest Therapy Guide Shawn Ramsey, this two-hour guided forest bathing experience invites you to slow down, awaken your senses, and reconnect with the natural world in a meaningful way[1]. Inspired by the Japanese practice of Shinrin-yoku, the journey includes mindful pauses, sensory activities, and quiet reflection designed to help you relax[2].

events.name: Girl Talk: Parent/Trusted Adult & Daughter Workshop
events.tagline: A candid workshop for 4th–7th graders and their caregivers to explore adolescent growth, puberty, and feminine hygiene.
events.freeNote: One ticket covers one adult-daughter pair; add-ons for additional daughters
events.description: This popular program addresses adolescent growth and development for 4th–7th grade girls, featuring 3-D exhibits, activities, and candid discussions on topics from the reproductive system to the menstrual cycle. Girls must attend with a caregiver or trusted adult; one ticket admits one adult-daughter pair.

events.name: Holly Springs Salamanders vs. Wilmington Sharks
events.tagline: Military Appreciation Night baseball game in Holly Springs
events.address: 3060 Hammond Business Place, Suite 121, Raleigh, NC 27610
events.description: The Holly Springs Salamanders host the Wilmington Sharks for Military Appreciation Night at North Main Athletic Complex on June 27, 2026 at 6:30 PM. Tickets are $17.

events.name: Horror Book Club
events.tagline: Join our free monthly horror book club to discuss chilling novels with fellow fans.
events.description: On Saturday, June 27, the Horror Book Club at Chapel of Bones will discuss 'The Devil in Silver' by Victor Lavalle at 10 AM. This free monthly event welcomes adults and teens to explore horror literature in a metal-themed coffee lounge.

events.name: PERREO: Noche Latina at The Dirty V
events.tagline: A high-energy Latin night built for dancing, drinks, food, music, and patio vibes in the heart of Glenwood South.
events.description: PERREO: Noche Latina is a vibrant Latin dance party featuring reggaeton and high-energy music, held at The Dirty V in Downtown Raleigh with food, drinks, and patio vibes.

events.name: Pride Patio Party
events.tagline: Celebrate Pride with local LGBTQ+ artists and DJs at Aura Lounge & Nightclub.
events.description: Join Girls Room for a Pride Month celebration featuring local and regional LGBTQ+ artists and DJs at Aura Raleigh. The event runs Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 4 PM to 9 PM with no cover charge.

events.name: SNL at KillJoy with Like Mike
events.tagline: Pick an era, pick a look, and pull up like Mike for a night of 80s hits and throwback fashion.
events.address: 116 N. West St., Ste. 100, Raleigh, NC 27603
events.description: This event celebrates the King of Pop with 80s hits, throwback fashion, and a dance floor full of memories for a mature crowd.

events.name: Sacred Song Series—Lift Every Voice: Community-Wide Sing-Along at Baptist Grove Church
events.tagline: Join the fourth NCMA community sing-along featuring spirituals, hymns, and civil rights music at Baptist Grove Church.
events.freeNote: Free with registration; pay-what-you-wish donation option
events.description: The public is invited to blend their voices in a community-wide sing-along curated by Dr. Tiffany Bennett-Cornelous, featuring spirituals and hymns of the Black church experience and music from the civil rights movement.

events.name: Set it Off - Live Stage Play & Creative Showcase
events.tagline: Experience live scenes from Set it Off plus poetry, music, art, trivia, and open discussions in this interactive creative showcase.
events.description: This interactive showcase features live scenes from the stage play Set it Off alongside poetry, music, art, trivia, and open discussions, presented by The Poetry Lounge as part of the Creative Black Cinema collection.

events.name: Summer Sax by the Tracks
events.tagline: All aboard for a summer day of live saxophone jazz and train rides at New Hope Valley Railway.
events.description: Enjoy live saxophone music featuring jazz standards and patriotic favorites while riding through the countryside at New Hope Valley Railway on Saturday, June 27, 2026.

events.name: Well Lived NC Expo - Aging in Place North Carolina
events.tagline: A free family expo blending aging resources, community, and fun for seniors and caregivers.
events.description: This high-energy afternoon brings together local experts and interactive exhibits focused on home safety, independence, and quality of life for anyone thinking about aging at home[1][2].

events.name: Zebulon Devil Dogz vs. Greensboro Ducks
events.tagline: Baseball showdown featuring SpongeBob SquarePants Night with specialty jersey auctions
events.description: The Zebulon Devil Dogz host the Greensboro Ducks at Nomaco Park on Saturday, June 27, 2026, at 6:30 PM for a special SpongeBob SquarePants Night featuring auctioned specialty jerseys worn by players and coaches.

events.name: Cary's Amazing Urban Family Race 2026
events.tagline: An evening of clues, challenges, sweet treats, and family fun in downtown Cary.
events.freeNote: Resident $15, Non-Resident $19 (covers up to 4 family members)
events.description: Families navigate downtown Cary solving clues and challenges while enjoying sweet treats in this urban exploration adventure. The top three winning families receive prizes at the finish.

events.name: Mill Open House 2026
events.tagline: Step inside the historic gristmill for a free, drop-in program with interpreters ready to share its history and inner workings.
events.description: The Mill Open House is a free, drop-in event at Historic Yates Mill County Park where historic interpreters are available to discuss the mill's history and operations. Visitors can explore the mill's inner workings from 1 to 4 p.m. on Saturdays and Sundays, with no registration required.

events.name: Rainbow Dance Party with Gay Agenda
events.tagline: Dance the night away under glittering disco balls in this special Pride edition of the Saturday DJ Dance Party.
events.description: This Pride edition of the Saturday DJ Dance Party features rainbows, glittering disco balls, and genre-hopping beats by Gay Agenda. Sip cocktails on the deck while enjoying rooftop breezes and special Pride drinks with no cover charge.

events.name: UCAN Gardeners as Teachers 2026
events.tagline: Hands-on workshops rooted in herbs, ancestral knowledge, and community learning.
events.description: Join Urban Community AgriNomics for hands-on gardening workshops focused on herbs and ancestral knowledge at Catawba Trail Farm in Durham.

events.name: "Our Day Out" Remembrance March & Resource Fair
events.tagline: Commemorating 45 years of Durham Pride with a march and resource fair celebrating NC's first Pride March.
events.venue: CCB Plaza & LGBTQ Center of Durham
events.description: A non-violent rally and march in Downtown Durham starting at CCB Plaza and ending at the LGBTQ Center of Durham, honoring the 1981 protest known as North Carolina's first Pride March.

events.name: Paper Streets Charrette #3: Let's Get Growing
events.tagline: A hands-on youth-led community day to reimagine an unused paper street behind The Scrap Exchange.
events.freeNote: Free and open to the community
events.description: Youth from echo's Youth Advisory Council lead this third in a 4-part charette series, inviting the Durham community to shape the future of an unused plot of land mapped as a road but never built. The event features art, interactive stations, conversation, food, and real opportunities to leave your mark on the space.

events.name: Summer Spins Record Show
events.tagline: A Saturday afternoon of vinyl browsing, live music, and beer at RTP's favorite jug.
events.venue: The Glass Jug Beer Lab - RTP
events.description: The Summer Spins Record Show features a huge selection of vinyl records, CDs, and music memorabilia alongside live music, trivia, comedy, and food trucks at The Glass Jug Beer Lab in Durham.

events.name: Peter Lamb Presents at Boxyard RTP
events.tagline: Calling all jazz enthusiasts, brace yourselves for a quarterly extravaganza!
events.description: Peter Lamb and the Wolves return to Boxyard RTP for a musical journey of jazzy, funky grooves on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM. The event is free and open to all jazz enthusiasts.

events.name: Kali Fuchis Presents: Puro Perreo Pari
events.tagline: A high-energy Latin Pride night of perreo, dancing, and 21+ vibes in Durham.
events.description: Puro Perreo Pari is a vibrant Latin Pride celebration at The Pinhook featuring DJ Más Culina, reggaeton beats, and late-night dancing for 21+ attendees in Durham.

events.name: 80's Hair Metal Dance Party
events.tagline: Break out the neon, big hair, and dancing shoes for an 80s dance party featuring the best hair metal of the 1980s.
events.description: An 80s dance party featuring the best hair metal of the 1980s at Yonder, Not Just a Bar in Hillsborough, with spandex, leather, and big hair encouraged.

events.name: Coffee Tasting Workshop for Everyone: Coffee of Guatemala
events.tagline: Explore the amazing flavors of coffees from Guatemala!
events.description: This workshop features brewing and tasting coffee grown by Anabella & Antonio Meneses from the Acatenago region of Guatemala, led by Open Eye Cafe's barista Annabella using coffee roasted by Carrboro Coffee Roasters.

events.name: The Science of Pride | Saturday Science Sparks
events.tagline: Celebrate science, identity, and community with LGBTQ+ scientists from UNC-Chapel Hill.
events.description: Join Saturday Science Sparks for a celebration of science and identity featuring DNA bracelet making, pipette art, and light spectrum experiments led by UNC-Chapel Hill's oSTEM group.

events.name: MTG "Two Blue" Pauper Cash Tournament (MTGPunks Series)
events.tagline: Pauper is the "oops! all commons!" MTG format where low-rarity cards drive the action.
events.description: A Saturday cash tournament featuring the Pauper format of Magic: The Gathering, with $30 entry going to the prize pool and bonus Dungeon-themed prizes.

events.name: Splash Pad Bash
events.tagline: Beat the heat with games, giveaways, and a live DJ at Knightdale's splash pad.
events.description: Splash Pad Bash is a free family event at Knightdale Station Park featuring fun games, giveaways, and a live DJ to help you cool off on Saturday, June 27, 2026, from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m.

events.name: 2026 Summer Concert Series
events.tagline: Free Sunday evening concerts featuring local artists at Pullen Park
events.description: The 2026 Summer Concert Series offers free Sunday evening performances by local artists at Pullen Park in Raleigh, with shows running from 6 to 8 PM.

events.name: The Sunday Set with DJ Skylan
events.tagline: Rooftop DJ vibes with live beats, $2 oysters, and a $10 spritz bar
events.description: A weekly rooftop event at The Durham Hotel featuring live DJ sets, fresh oysters, and a build-your-own spritz bar with great views of Durham.

events.name: Day Party Brunch
events.tagline: Raleigh's hottest all-you-can-eat Sunday brunch party with craft cocktails and live DJ vibes.
events.description: An all-you-can-eat brunch buffet party featuring elevated dishes, craft cocktails, and vibrant energy with a live DJ every Sunday at Botanical Lounge.

events.name: Cocktails & Cuisine Class: Popping into Summer
events.tagline: Pop into summer with bubbly cocktails and champagne sabering at Raleigh's rooftop lounge.
events.description: Join The Willard's bartenders to craft two summer-perfect bubbly cocktails and learn the art of sabering champagne, all while enjoying skyline views and seasonal bites.

events.name: Summer Family Film Series - The Parent Trap
events.tagline: Retro twin-sister comedy at noon on Sunday for the whole family
events.scheduleNote: Sun 12:00 PM · doors open 1/2 hour prior
events.description: The 1961 retro comedy about identical twin sisters who swap places to reunite their divorced parents, shown at noon on Sunday as part of The Cary Theater's Summer Family Series.

events.name: Cary Tennis Classic 2026
events.tagline: Annual ATP Challenger and ITF Women's professional tennis tournament at Cary Tennis Park
events.scheduleNote: Fri 11:00 AM · Sat 12:00 PM · Sun 2:00 PM
events.description: The 12th annual Cary Tennis Classic is a professional tennis tournament featuring ATP Men and ITF Women players on outdoor hardcourts at Cary Tennis Park, running from June 28 to July 5, 2026.

events.name: Room 861 at Goodnights: Lewis Belt
events.tagline: Oakland-born, LA-based stand-up comedian Lewis Belt brings his sharp humor to Raleigh's Goodnights Comedy Club.
events.description: Lewis Belt, an Oakland-born and LA-based stand-up comedian, actor, and producer, performs at Goodnights Comedy Club in Raleigh on June 26, 2026. This 18+ show features two performances with a 2-item minimum per person in the showroom.

events.name: Special Event: Gianmarco Soresi
events.tagline: NYC-based stand-up comedian Gianmarco Soresi brings his sharp, creator-driven humor to Raleigh's Goodnights Comedy Club.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 6–10 PM · Sat 12–8 PM · Sun 12–8 PM
events.description: Gianmarco Soresi, a New York-based stand-up comedian and actor, performs his original comedy at Goodnights Comedy Club in Raleigh over three days in late June 2026.

events.name: DexFest 2026 Wrap Party
events.tagline: The Sunday wrap party for Dex Fest featuring live music, a community art project, and a shared catered meal.
events.address: 506 West Franklin Street, Chapel Hill, NC 27516
events.description: DexFest 2026 Wrap Party is the Sunday conclusion to the music festival honoring Dexter Romweber, held at Local 506 with live performances and community activities.

events.name: Anthem of the Sundays Feat: Bring Out Yer Dead
events.tagline: A Grateful Dead tribute band brings the experience of legendary Dead shows to Lincoln Theatre on a Sunday night.
events.description: Bring Out Yer Dead, a Grateful Dead tribute band, performs as part of Lincoln Theatre's 'Anthem of the Sundays' residency on Sunday, June 28, 2026, at 6pm in Downtown Raleigh.

events.name: Everything Yes
events.tagline: Jazz-fusion band Everything Yes brings their sound to Kings with Flower in Bloom
events.description: Everything Yes, a jazz-fusion band from North Carolina, performs at Kings in Raleigh on Sunday, June 28, 2026, with special guest Flower in Bloom. Doors open at 7 PM and the show starts at 8 PM.

events.name: Mac Saturn
events.tagline: Indie rock show at Cannonball Music Hall this Sunday
events.description: Mac Saturn performs an indie rock show at Cannonball Music Hall in Raleigh on Sunday, June 28, 2026, starting at 7:30 PM.

events.name: The SoapGirls
events.tagline: Alternative rock duo from Cape Town brings the Rebel DNA Tour to Raleigh with wild energy.
events.venue: The Pour House Music Hall & Record Shop
events.description: The SoapGirls, an alternative rock duo from Cape Town, perform live at The Pour House in Raleigh on Sunday, June 28, 2026, at 8:00 PM as part of their Rebel DNA Tour.

events.name: Vintage Market at Wolfe & Porter
events.tagline: Shop vintage clothing, housewares, and gifts while enjoying a cocktail on a Sunday afternoon in Downtown Raleigh.
events.description: Raleigh's Wolfe & Porter hosts a monthly Vintage Market on Sunday afternoons featuring vintage clothing, housewares, and gifts. Visitors can enjoy a cocktail while shopping for unique treasures in Downtown Raleigh.

events.name: Zebulon Devil Dogz vs. Florence Flamingos
events.tagline: Local baseball showdown at Five County Stadium on Sunday, June 28
events.description: Zebulon Devil Dogz face off against Florence Flamingos in a Sunday afternoon baseball game at Five County Stadium in Zebulon, NC.

events.name: GAY 4 CUNTRY KARAOKE!
events.tagline: Sing your favorite country songs and celebrate inclusiveness at Neptunes!
events.description: Join Neptunes Parlour every 4th Sunday for Gay for Country Karaoke, where you can sing country classics and celebrate inclusiveness in a rowdy Sunday night atmosphere.

events.name: Live Music at Pine State Coffee with Firefly Strings
events.tagline: A laid-back Sunday afternoon of live string arrangements, coffee, and good company.
events.description: Firefly Strings performs live string arrangements of pop hits and crowd favorites at Pine State Coffee on Sunday, June 28, 2026, from 11 a.m. to 1:30 p.m. The event is free and open to all ages.

events.name: Mike Krause & The Third Expression
events.tagline: Instrumental Americana and jazz fusion with Dan Davis and Floy Doy at Stanczyks
events.description: Mike Krause & The Third Expression perform instrumental Americana and new original music with Dan Davis on drums and E. Scott Warren on bass, sharing the bill with jazz group Floy Doy at Stanczyks in Durham.

events.name: Sunday DRIFT Rooftop DJ Series at The Velvet Hippo!
events.tagline: End your weekend on a high note with music drifting from the rooftop DJ sets.
events.description: Every Sunday, music drifts from the rooftop on Orange Street as local Velvet Hippo DJs spin afternoon sets. No cover charge, but entry is restricted to guests 21+.

events.name: Afterburn
events.tagline: Gear up for the 4th of July with arcade games, pizza, and party vibes at Boxcar Bar + Arcade.
events.description: Afterburn is a Sunday party at Boxcar Bar + Arcade in Durham, featuring arcade games, pizza, and a festive atmosphere to celebrate the upcoming 4th of July.

events.name: Thirdfest — a Benefit Festival for Queer Youth
events.tagline: A benefit festival raising money for queer youth featuring six bands across screamo, hardcore, and mathgrind.
events.description: Thirdfest is a benefit festival hosted by The Pinhook in Durham to raise money for queer youth, featuring six bands across the screamo, hardcore, and mathgrind spectrum.

events.name: 2026 Culinary Lavender Lunch Tour
events.tagline: Savor a gourmet lavender-infused lunch in Chapel Hill's historic boutique setting.
events.description: This culinary event offers a lavender-infused lunch experience at The Lavender Boutique in Chapel Hill, part of Lavender Oaks Farm's 2026 spring and summer tour series. Tickets are $65 per person for individual lunches, with group tours available for 25+ guests.

events.name: Summer Tree Walk
events.tagline: A scenic fundraising walk through the historic woodlands of Moorefields
events.description: Summer Tree Walk is a fundraising event hosted by Friends of Moorefields, offering a guided walk through the historic 70-acre wildlife refuge in Hillsborough, NC.

events.name: Open Mic Night
events.tagline: A monthly community showcase where local artists perform live on stage.
events.description: Open Mic Night is Theatre Raleigh Art Center's monthly community showcase where local artists perform live on stage at The Green Room, hosted by Jeff Cosco.

events.name: Queer Media Marathon at Bitter Social
events.tagline: A relaxed queer movie marathon to recover and recharge after Pride weekend.
events.description: The Queer Media Marathon is a relaxed viewing event hosted the Sunday following Pride weekend to help attendees recover and recharge.

events.name: SaziFest 2026
events.tagline: A high-energy block party festival celebrating music, community, and creative vibes.
events.description: SaziFest 2026 is an immersive in-person festival with a block party theme featuring DJs, live performers, food, and community activities for ages 21+.

events.name: Bridgerton Tea Party: A Regency-Inspired Day of Food
events.tagline: Step into a Regency-era tea party with curated hot teas, finger foods, and Bridgerton trivia in South Raleigh.
events.description: This Regency-inspired tea party features curated hot teas, a tower of finger foods, and Bridgerton trivia at Fun & Fellowship in South Raleigh on Sunday, June 28, 2026.

events.name: Second Stage 2026 - Dr. Ride’s American Beach House
events.tagline: An intimate snapshot of queer anti-heroines on a sweltering 1983 rooftop before a historic space flight.
events.scheduleNote: Fri 7:30 PM · Sat 7:30 PM · Sun 2 PM & 5 PM
events.description: Presented by Brave New Classics at Burning Coal Theatre, this play depicts women challenging American norms on a St. Louis rooftop in 1983.
